data.title: PRESIDENT SAMIA RECEIVES COMMISSION OF INQUIRY REPORT; CALLS FOR NATIONAL HEALING, ACCOUNTABILITY AND REFORMS
data.description: Tanzania's President, Dr. Samia Suluhu Hassan, has officially accepted the Report of the Presidential Commission of Inquiry on the violence and breach of peace incidents following recent events. The handover took place in Dar es Salaam on April 24, 2026. The commission's findings shed light on the circumstances surrounding the violence and disorder in the United Republic of Tanzania, providing crucial insights for addressing the aftermath. President Hassan's reception of this report marks a significant step towards understanding and resolving the issues arising from the aforementioned events.

data.title: Made-in-China.com Unveils SourcingAI: The Ultimate AI Tool for Sourcing Chinese Products Globally
data.description: NANJING, China - On April 24, 2026, professional buyers in the global B2B trade sector are increasingly looking for smarter and faster methods to manage sourcing processes. The traditional approaches that have been in use are no longer meeting the needs of the industry in today's rapidly changing landscape. This shift is driven by the need for enhanced efficiency and intelligence in operations.

data.title: Kaspi.kz Successfully Issues $600 million of 5.900% Senior Unsecured Notes due 2031
data.description: Kaspi.kz, a Joint Stock Company based in Almaty, Kazakhstan, revealed that they have effectively issued $600 million worth of 2031 senior unsecured Notes. The company, traded under the NASDAQ symbol KSPI, made this announcement recently.

data.title: IBM AI Success Faces Macro Headwinds: Analyst Cuts Price Target
data.description: IBM (NYSE: IBM) saw a decline in shares during early trading following a positive first-quarter report. The company exceeded expectations on both revenue and profit but maintained its yearly forecast due to external economic challenges. Analyst Dan Ives from Wedbush still rated IBM as Outperform but reduced the price target from $340 to $320. The company experienced a surge in demand for AI services within software, with total revenues reaching $15.92 billion, a 6% increase from the previous year in constant currency. Analysts had expected $15.63 billion. IBM's strong performance was credited to clients utilizing their services to update core systems and expand AI integration. More insights can be found on various analyst ratings.

data.title: Huize Holding Limited Files 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: Shenzhen, China - On April 24, 2026, Huize Holding Limited (NASDAQ: HUIZ), a prominent insurance technology platform in Asia, disclosed the submission of its annual report for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, on Form 20-F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). Huize specializes in connecting consumers, insurance carriers, and distribution partners digitally via data-centric and AI-driven solutions.

data.title: Tabulera Announces Early Partner Access to Small Group EDI
data.description: Tabulera, LLC has unveiled Small Group EDI, an innovative solution utilizing artificial intelligence to streamline the employee benefits enrollment process on carrier web portals. This system is designed to cater specifically to small groups and employers facing EDI black-out periods. Early partner access to this cutting-edge product was announced today by the Pleasanton-based company. The launch date is April 24, 2026.

data.title: Made-in-China.com and the Uzbekistan Business Diplomacy Association Launch Green Manufacturing Initiative on Earth Day
data.description: In Tashkent, Uzbekistan, on April 24, 2026, Made-in-China.com, a prominent platform for global cross-border trade, introduced the "Green Commitment • Across the Silk Road" campaign on the 57th Earth Day anniversary. This initiative aims to promote environmentally-friendly practices along the Silk Road.
